<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << packet_id;
        stream << hexi::length_adaptor(username);
        stream << hexi::length_adaptor(scores);
        stream << hexi::null_terminated(metadata);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::DynamicBuffer buffer;
    hexi::BufferAdaptor adaptor(buffer);
    packet.serialise(adaptor);
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    
    // Read message_type from first 2 bytes
    header.message_type = hexi::read_uint16(buffer.data(), 0);
    
    // Read body_length from next 4 bytes
    header.body_length = hexi::read_uint32(buffer.data(), 2);
    
    // Skip the body data
    hexi::skip(buffer.data(), 6, header.body_length);
    
    // Read footer from after the body
    header.footer = hexi::read_uint32(buffer.data(), 6 + header.body_length);
    
    return header;
}

    }
    return std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data()), buffer.size());
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    
    // Preview data_type without advancing the read pointer
    uint8_t data_type;
    adaptor.peek(&data_type, sizeof(data_type));
    
    // Read item_count
    uint32_t item_count;
    adaptor.read(&item_count, sizeof(item_count));
    
    // Use binary_stream to read items based on data_type
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    DataResult result;
    result.data_type = data_type;
    
    if (data_type == 0) { // Integers
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            stream >> result.int_items[i];
        }
    } else { // Floats
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            stream >> result.float_items[i];
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<think>Okay, I need to implement the read_header_with_span function using the Hexi library's buffer_adaptor and binary_stream with zero-copy operations. Let me think about how to approach this.

First, the function takes a std::span<const uint8_t> as input. The goal is to read a PacketHeader structure from this buffer. The PacketHeader has three fields: magic (uint32_t), version (uint16_t), and flags (uint16_t). So the total size should be 4 + 2 + 2 = 8 bytes.

The user mentioned using buffer_adaptor's pointer methods and binary_stream's zero-copy operations. Wait, but the function parameter is already a span. Maybe the idea is to use Hexi's buffer_adaptor to create an adaptor from the span, then use binary_stream to read the data without copying.

Let me recall how Hexi's buffer_adaptor works. The buffer_adaptor class can wrap a pointer and size, providing methods like get_read_ptr(), check_available(), etc. But since we have a span, perhaps we can convert the span into a buffer_adaptor.

Wait, the function parameter is a const std::span<const uint8_t>, which gives us a contiguous range of bytes. To use Hexi's buffer_adaptor, we might need to create an instance of hexi::buffer_adaptor from this span. Then, using a hexi::binary_stream with that adaptor, we can read the header fields directly into the PacketHeader structure.

But how exactly? Let's outline the steps:

#include <vector>

#include <algorithm>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t current_offset = storage.get_read_offset();
    size_t total_write = storage.get_write_offset();
    size_t readable_size = total_write - current_offset;
    size_t bytes_available = std::min(bytes_to_preview, readable_size);

    size_t total_copied = 0;

        size_t bytes_in_block = current_block->size();
        size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_available - total_copied, bytes_in_block - block_offset);
        
        const uint8_t* data_ptr = current_block->data() + block_offset;
        result.insert(result.end(), data_ptr, data_ptr + bytes_to_copy);
        total_copied += bytes_to_copy;
        
        current_block = current_block->next();
    }
    
    return result;
}

    size_t current_block_used = storage.get_write_offset() % block_size;
    size_t free_space = block_size - current_block_used;
    return {readable_size, free_space};
}

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t current_offset = storage.get_read_offset();
    size_t total_write = storage.get_write_offset();
    size_t readable_size = total_write - current_offset;
    size_t bytes_available = std::min(bytes_to_preview, readable_size);
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    result.reserve(bytes_available);
    
    const auto* current_block = storage.get_current_read_block();
    size_t total_copied = 0;
    
    while (current_block != nullptr && total_copied < bytes_available) {
        size_t block_offset = current_offset % block_size;
        size_t bytes_in_block = current_block->size();
        size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_available - total_copied, bytes_in_block - block_offset);
        
        const uint8_t* data_ptr = current_block->data() + block_offset;
        result.insert(result.end(), data_ptr, data_ptr + bytes_to_copy);
        total_copied += bytes_to_copy;
        
        current_block = current_block->next();
    }
    
    return result;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    size_t readable_size = storage.get_write_offset() - storage.get_read_offset();
    size_t current_block_used = storage.get_write_offset() % block_size;
    size_t free_space = block_size - current_block_used;
    return {readable_size, free_space};
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.set_read_offset(0);
    storage.set_write_offset(0);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::mode::read);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_read);
    size_t bytes_read = buffer.read(result.data(), bytes_to_read);
    result.resize(bytes_read);
    return result;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::mode::read);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_preview);
    size_t bytes_copied = buffer.copy(result.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    result.resize(bytes_copied);
    return result;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::mode::write);
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::mode::read);
    return buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>
#include <stdexcept>

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_header(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t header_size) {
    hexi::file_buffer fb;
    fb.open(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::read_mode);
    if (!fb.is_open()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file");
    }
    
    // Save the current file position
    auto original_pos = fb.tell();
    
    // Prepare buffer to hold header data
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(header_size);
    
    // Read header data into buffer
    size_t bytes_read = fb.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(buffer.data()), header_size);
    
    // Adjust buffer size if file is shorter than header_size
    if (bytes_read < header_size) {
        buffer.resize(bytes_read);
    }
    
    // Reset file position to original location
    fb.seek(original_pos);
    
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    size_t elements_to_write = std::min(data.size(), buffer_size);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < elements_to_write; ++i) {
        buffer[i] = static_cast<std::byte>(data[i]);
    }
    // If data is smaller than buffer_size, the remaining bytes in the buffer are unchanged.
    // This is acceptable as per the problem description.
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    size_t elements_to_read = std::min(bytes_to_read, buffer_size);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    result.reserve(elements_to_read);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < elements_to_read; ++i) {
        result.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(buffer[i]));
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstring>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_uint32_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, uint32_t value) {
    std::byte bytes[4];
    std::memcpy(bytes, &value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.write(bytes, 4);
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
uint32_t read_uint32_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    std::byte bytes[4];
    // Read the last 4 bytes from the buffer
    for (size_t i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
        bytes[i] = buffer[buffer.size() - 4 + i];
    }
    uint32_t result;
    std::memcpy(&result, bytes, sizeof(result));

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << user_id << name;
    }
};

void serialize_object(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const UserData& data) {
    data.serialise(writer);
}

void deserialize_object(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader, UserData& data) {
    data.serialise(reader);
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstring>
#include <array>

struct BufferInfo {
    std::size_t size;
    std::size_t free_space;
};

void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t value, const void* data, std::size_t length) {
    // Write the integer value
    std::array<std::byte, sizeof(value)> value_bytes;
    std::memcpy(value_bytes.data(), &value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.write(value_bytes.data(), value_bytes.size());
    
    // Write the data
    if (data != nullptr && length > 0) {
        buffer.write(static_cast<const std::byte*>(data), length);
    }
}

void read_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t& value, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    // Read the integer value
    std::array<std::byte, sizeof(value)> value_bytes;
    buffer.read(value_bytes.data(), value_bytes.size());
    std::memcpy(&value, value_bytes.data(), sizeof(value));
    
    // Read the data
    if (data != nullptr && length > 0) {
        buffer.read(static_cast<std::byte*>(data), length);
    }
}

BufferInfo get_buffer_info(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - buffer.size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

    return decoded_value == original_value;
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string result;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(result);
    return result;
}

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const char* src_start = static_cast<const char*>(src);
    const char* src_end = src_start + src_len;
    const char* dst_start = static_cast<const char*>(dst);
    const char* dst_end = dst_start + dst_len;
    
    return (src_start < dst_end) && (dst_start < src_end);
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UnderrunInfo {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t buff_size;
    bool occurred;
};

UnderrunInfo catch_buffer_underrun() {
    UnderrunInfo info{0, 0, 0, false};
    try {
        // Simulate throwing a buffer_underrun exception with example values
        throw hexi::exception("buffer_underrun", 5, 10, 8);
    } catch (const hexi::exception& e) {
        // Assuming the exception has getters for the required fields
        info.read_size = e.get_read_size();
        info.total_read = e.get_total_read();
        info.buff_size = e.get_buff_size();
        info.occurred = true;
    }
    return info;
}

UnderrunInfo safe_read_with_underrun_check(
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer,
    void* destination,
    std::size_t length) {
    UnderrunInfo info{0, 0, 0, false};
    try {
        buffer.read(destination, length);
        // Read successful, no underrun occurred
        info.occurred = false;
    } catch (const hexi::exception& e) {
        if (e.is_buffer_underrun()) { // Check if the exception is a buffer underrun
            info.read_size = e.get_read_size();
            info.total_read = e.get_total_read();
            info.buff_size = e.get_buff_size();
            info.occurred = true;
        }
        // Re-throw other exceptions to maintain exception safety
        throw;
    }
    return info;
}
```</answer>

    auto data_bytes = hexi::prefixed_varint<std::string>::serialize(packet.data);
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), data_bytes.begin(), data_bytes.end());
    
    return buffer;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream stream(allocator, adaptor);

    // Write header
    stream.write(packet.header);

    // Write data length and data content
    uint32_t data_length = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.length());
    stream.write(data_length);
    stream.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.length());

    // Write 16 bytes of padding filled with 0x00
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);

    // Write footer
    stream.write(packet.footer);

    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;

    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}

};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {

    obj1->id = 1;
    obj1->value = 10.5;

    PoolObject* obj3 = allocator.allocate();
    obj3->id = 3;
    obj3->value = 30.9;
    pool.push_back(obj3);
    
    return pool;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor writer(buffer);
    
    // Ensure enough space for input data
    if (writer.free() < input_data.size()) {
        buffer.resize(input_data.size());
    }
    
    // Write data to buffer
    writer.write(input_data.data(), input_data.size());
    
    // Read data back from buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor reader(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(reader.size());
    reader.read(result.data(), result.size());
    
    return result;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer_data);
    
    // Peek at data without advancing read pointer
    auto peeked_data = adaptor.copy(peek_size);
    
    // Get pointer to current read position and consume data
    const uint8_t* ptr = adaptor.read_ptr();
    adaptor.read(peek_size);
    
    return peeked_data;
}
```</answer>

```cpp
#include <hexi/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Convert message_id to big-endian and write
    auto msg_id_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(msg_id_big);
    
    // Convert count to big-endian and write
    auto count_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data_values.size()));
    stream.write(count_big);
    
    // Convert each data_value to big-endian and write
    for (auto val : packet.data_values) {
        auto val_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(val);
        stream.write(val_big);
    }
    
    // Convert checksum to big-endian and write
    auto checksum_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(checksum_big);
    
    return buffer.data();
}
```

For deserialize_protocol_packet:

```cpp
ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Read message_id and convert to native
    uint32_t msg_id_big;
    stream.read(msg_id_big);
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(msg_id_big);
    
    // Read count and convert to native
    uint32_t count_big;
    stream.read(count_big);
    uint32_t count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count_big);
    
    // Read data_values vector using read_container with count
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    stream.read_container(data_values, count);
    
    // Convert each element to native
    for (auto& val : data_values) {
        val = hexi::endian::big_to_native(val);
    }
    packet.data_values = std::move(data_values);
    
    // Read checksum and convert to native
    uint32_t checksum_big;
    stream.read(checksum_big);
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum_big);
    
    return packet;
}
```

For extract_protocol_header:

```cpp
ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Get a span of the first 4 bytes (message_id)
    auto header_span = stream.span(4);
    
    // Convert to native endianness
    uint32_t msg_id_big;
    std::memcpy(&msg_id_big, header_span.data(), sizeof(msg_id_big));
    uint32_t msg_id_native = hexi::endian::big_to_native(msg_id_big);
    
    // Skip the header
    stream.skip(4);
    
    return ProtocolHeader{msg_id_native};
}
```

But wait, the extract_protocol_header function uses stream.span(4) to get a view of the first 4 bytes. Then, copies those bytes into msg_id_big, converts to native, and skips 4 bytes. This assumes that the buffer starts with the message_id. This is correct because the protocol packet starts with the message_id.

Now, testing this code. Let's say we have a ProtocolPacket with message_id=0x12345678, data_values={0xABCD, 0x1234}, checksum=0x55AA55AA.

When serialized, the buffer would contain:

- 4 bytes: 0x12, 0x34, 0x56, 0x78 (big-endian message_id)
- 4 bytes: 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x02 (big-endian count=2)
- 2*2=4 bytes: 0xAB, 0xCD, 0x12, 0x34 (big-endian data_values)
- 4 bytes: 0x55, 0xAA, 0x55, 0xAA (big-endian checksum)

When deserialized, the code reads the message_id, converts to native (assuming little-endian system, it would be 0x78563412), then reads the count (2), reads two data_values (0xCDAB and 0x3412), converts to native (0xABCD and 0x1234), then reads the checksum (0xAA55AA55).

The extract_protocol_header function would read the first 4 bytes, convert to native, and return the message_id.

This seems to align with the requirements.

};

    }
    
    // Convert checksum to big-endian and write
    auto checksum_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);

}

    }

    // Read checksum and convert to native
    uint32_t checksum_big;
    stream.read(checksum_big);
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum_big);
    
    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
        adaptor.write(sensor_id); // Written in native endianness
        adaptor.write(static_cast<uint32_t>(temperatures.size()));
        for (float temp : temperatures) {
            float converted = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(converted);
        }
        double pressure_converted = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
        adaptor.write(pressure_converted);
    }
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor.read(sensor_id); // Read in native endianness
        uint32_t temp_count;
        adaptor.read(temp_count);
        temperatures.resize(temp_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < temp_count; ++i) {
            float temp;
            adaptor.read(temp);
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            temperatures[i] = temp;
        }
        double pressure;
        adaptor.read(pressure);
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
        this->pressure = pressure;
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor;
    adaptor.serialise(data);
    return adaptor.get_buffer();
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    MeasurementData data;
    adaptor.deserialise(data);
    return data;
}

    }
    
    adaptor.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));
